title: Revert #28401, show :latest tag in artifact ls output when no explicit tag given
body:
As discussed on https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28401 we should revert these changes.

comments.body: I think we're good to merge. Or should we wait for an LGTM from @mtrmac and @baude first?
